name: Email Digest
description: Sends a daily summary email of all chain runs (completed, stopped, pending approvals). Useful for team visibility without per-run noise.
author: mentiko

configSchema.label: Digest buffer file path
configSchema.description: Local file used to buffer events before sending digest (default: /tmp/mentiko-digest.jsonl)

configSchema.label: Send after N events
configSchema.description: Flush digest after accumulating N events (0 = only on schedule)
